name: Madame Wu's Chinese Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: Oil for deep frying in wok
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam chicken breasts or cook in a microwave until barely done; skin, bone and shred (this is easy if you used 2 forks).
2. In a medium-sized bowl, mix soy sauce, mustard, sesame oil, and Five Spice Powder (available in Asian food sections of most supermarkets) with sliced green onion; marinade chicken in this sauce, covered.
3. Heat oil very hot (drop a piece of won ton skin into the oil – if it floats right back up, the oil is hot enough). Fry won ton skins until just beginning to turn golden; remove and drain on paper towels using a slotted spoon.
4. Fry rice noodles in hot oil for a few seconds; they will puff up almost immediately. Remove and drain immediately (they will be white).
5. When ready to serve, slice lettuce thinly into strips. Add chicken and marinade, fried won ton skins, and fried noodles (crumble a little as you add them) into the bowl. Sprinkle with almonds. Serve from a large bowl ringed with whole lettuce leaves.
